name: NSF Returned Payment Handling
description: Accounting reviews returned payments, ledger impact, fee eligibility, notice drafts, and repeat-risk tracking with human approval before any fee, ledger posting, resident notice, payment action, or AppFolio write.

stages.name: Normalize Returned Payment
stages.description: Normalize the returned payment event and missing accounting facts.

steps.title: Normalize returned payment
steps.instructions: Normalize resident, tenant account, property, unit, payment id, return date, amount, reason code, payment method, rent period, open balance, fee policy source, prior returned-payment count, and missing facts. Unknown ledger amounts, reason codes, or fee eligibility must remain null with needs_verification.
steps.dispatch_body: Normalize returned-payment facts and missing-data flags. No ledger posting, fees, resident sends, payment attempts, or AppFolio writes.

steps.title: Check duplicate and reversal state
steps.instructions: Check whether the return, reversal, fee, notice, or repayment plan has already been handled by a human or system. If already owned or complete, surface current state and do not stage duplicate action.
steps.dispatch_body: Check duplicate/reversal ownership before any action. No ledger posting, fees, sends, or payment attempts.

stages.name: Ledger And Policy Review
stages.description: Draft the ledger impact and policy packet without changing accounting records.

steps.title: Draft ledger impact packet
steps.instructions: Draft ledger impact from returned amount, rent period, current balance, late-fee interaction, NSF fee policy, prior returns, owner impact, and repayment risk. Draft-only; never post a reversal, fee, charge, payment, or AppFolio note.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft returned-payment ledger impact and policy packet. No fees, ledger posting, payment action, resident sends, or AppFolio writes.

steps.title: Review ledger impact packet
steps.instructions: Review returned-payment ledger impact, policy support, fee eligibility, duplicate state, and missing data before any resident notice, fee, reversal, repayment, or escalation packet is drafted.
steps.human_prompt: Review returned-payment ledger and policy packet before fee, notice, or accounting action.

stages.name: Notice And Fee Approval
stages.description: Draft resident notice and fee action packets for approval.

steps.title: Draft returned payment action packet
steps.instructions: Draft resident notice, internal ledger action summary, fee recommendation if policy-supported, repayment option notes, repeat-risk flag, and escalation caveats. Draft-only; do not send to resident, post fees, reverse ledger entries, attempt payment, or write AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft returned-payment notice and fee packet only. No sends, fees, ledger postings, payment attempts, or AppFolio writes.

steps.title: Approve returned payment action
steps.instructions: Approve, edit, or hold before any NSF fee, reversal, ledger adjustment, resident notice, repayment request, payment retry, delinquency escalation, owner update, or AppFolio write.
steps.human_prompt: Approval required before returned-payment fee, ledger, resident, owner, payment, escalation, or system action.

stages.name: Track Returned Payment
stages.description: Stage approved action metadata and internal repeat-risk tracking.

steps.title: Stage approved returned payment package
steps.instructions: Stage approved resident notice draft, ledger action notes, fee metadata, repeat-risk flag, repayment due date if approved, and escalation handoff data for operator release. Do not send, post, retry payment, or write systems.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage approved returned-payment package for human release. No sends, fees, ledger postings, payment attempts, or system writes.

steps.title: Record returned payment closeout
steps.instructions: Record approval source, returned-payment state, repeat-risk flag, unresolved needs_verification fields, and next owner. Internal audit only; do not contact residents or write accounting systems.
steps.dispatch_body: Record internal returned-payment closeout and next owner. No external sends or system writes.
